description: Many people think the US Constitution is not enforceable.  Think again.  Here you will find a mountain of examples showing you that the Constitution is a fully enforceable, iron clad guarantee of freedom.  The Declaration of Independence and Your Complete Constitution - With Easy Guide to Public Enforcement Constitution Class by Michael Badnarik - Michael Badnarik Hide Your Guns! Constitution Class taught by Michael Badnarik - Michael Badnarik Jury Nullification and People's Grand Jury - The Power to End Dictatorship is in Your Hands KNOW YOUR RIGHTS! Education for Police & We the People - Alex Jones - Infowars If You See Something, Film Something - The Improtance of Videotaping Police 10 Rules for Dealing with Police (Full-Length) - flexyourrights.org The Orson Welles Sketchbook - Why the Job of Police Should be Made Difficult - Orson Welles What to Do at TSA-Gestapo Checkpoints - Life in a Police State Do You Have to Show an ID to a Cop? How do You Refuse a Search on Your Car? Don't talk to the police
